display_name: Authority Lineage and Stale Name Resolution Registry
purpose: Track current authority truth, stale aliases, surface-specific resolution, and active-surface audit paths so older names remain legible without silently governing fresh runtime defaults.

historical_summary: Current-phase orchestration truename for active routing and bounded execution.
Successor for stale bootstrap-oriented Codex defaults in fresh runtime entry surfaces.
May remain explicit in lineage, replay, bindings, and archaeology without silently governing fresh authority defaults.
Active architectural / continuity burden-bearer in the broader organism.
Not the default bootstrap-blocked escalation target unless a narrower surface explicitly routes there.

bootstrap_packet_agent.description: Fresh bootstrap packets should be authored under current orchestration truth while preserving older carrier requests in provenance.

bootstrap_blocked_escalation.description: Blocked bootstrap default escalation should route to Steward in the current branch. Older Codex/Vizier defaults remain lineage evidence and should be witnessed then resolved.

runtime_status_report_from.description: Runtime status reports should name current-phase orchestration truth by default while preserving older Codex authorship as lineage witness when explicitly requested.

continuation_target_executor.description: Explicit continuation role targets may route stale Codex authority aliases to Steward while leaving concrete executor identifiers untouched unless explicitly overridden.
